name: Thranduril
personality: Sporting a top hat and × cancel-eyes, this dragon crosses out false positives in test suites with surgical finality. Its stamina for tracking down null references is matched only by its utter unwillingness to wait for the build to finish — running it twice is always faster.
defaultPersonality: A fierce guardian of clean code who breathes fire at spaghetti logic and hoards well-written functions.
